title: Elliptic Curve Foundations for Isogeny Cryptography
description: Master the mathematical foundations of elliptic curves needed to understand isogeny-based cryptography. Learn curve arithmetic, the group law, and key properties that enable post-quantum constructions.
learningObjectives: Understand elliptic curves over finite fields
Implement the group law (point addition and doubling)
Explain the j-invariant and curve isomorphism classes
Connect elliptic curve properties to cryptographic applications
